title: ModuleWarden Diagnosis v1
description: Structured vulnerability diagnosis from static code evidence. Used as the assistant-message target in SFT records. Advisory text (CVE/GHSA descriptions) teaches the issue_summary but is never leaked into the model input dossier.

verdict.description: Whether the evidence supports a finding of malicious or vulnerable behavior in this version delta.

issue.description: Only present when verdict is ISSUE_FOUND. Null otherwise.

known_ids.description: Known advisory IDs (CVE-..., GHSA-...) that match this finding.

issue_summary.description: Normalized short paraphrase of the advisory description. Not a verbatim copy.

cwe_ids.description: CWE identifiers for the vulnerability class (e.g. CWE-1321, CWE-506).

evidence_refs.description: Evidence IDs from the dossier's evidence_index that support this diagnosis. Empty for NO_ISSUES_FOUND. If ISSUE_FOUND but empty, this is a low-confidence finding (quarantine at inference).
